creator: kwm@rainbow-runner.nl
text:
You need to update your install ports first before gimp will be buildable.
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/handbook/ports-using.html Chapter 5.6.5.2 or 
5.6.5.3.

Package dependency requirement 'atk >= 2.2.0' could not be satisfied.
Package 'atk' has version '2.0.1', required version is '>= 2.2.0'
